title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kaido, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Kanjuro, Unknown person #3 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey! Black Maria!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You've got a job to do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh relaxax, supreme commander!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There are plenty of people searching already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll stay right here.:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wororooro! Works for me! This is the one day we can let loose and party!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't that right, Orochi? It's the best day of the year!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Gufufufufu! But of course, Kaido!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After 20 years, the damn ghosts of the Kozuki clan have all vanished!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THAT CALLS FOR SOME CELEBRATION!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kanjuro's life as an actor will soon be over. He's on his way here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's coming with the captains who sunk the red scabbards to the bottom of the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: excellent. I thought I might have accidentally killed him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Still...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If he's really so trust- worthy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: And he says he's heard nothing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then open really didn't give them any clues to LAUGH TALE...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: K'HAAH! What are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: I have business with Orochi- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Ah, Kanjuro! You're here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It has been too long, Crochi- Sama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The estate is quite large, and I found myself a bit lost.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Knock it off, dammit! He's one of Orochi's men!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Some of your comrades took me for an enemy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was forced to cut them all down. Forgive me!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! That boy there, in your hand...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Indeed! He is the one you wanted!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: MOMONO- SURE, SOME OF ODEN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Anyone knows

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The boy planned to cut his ropes and escape, so I made sure he couldn't move!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the matter? Worry not, the boy still breathes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's the heir to the Kozuki clan! His MASTER!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhaha haha! The man has ice in his veins!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that my role has ended, he's no more than a brat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Well, I'll be damned... I know you.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You're one of the nine Red Scabbards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And I know HIM, too.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: your father...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: is just an idiot Lord.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: This is Oden's boy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What a disappoint- went. He looks exactly the same!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes, little more than a filthy runt.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He's hardly worthy of his own name.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How sad. Beating a little boy until he's battered and bleeding...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: GLUG GLUG!!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: What a performance! Let's drink to Kanjuro!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Please, no, orochi- Sama!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 48 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
